# calvindotsg/homebrew-tap

> Personal Homebrew tap: formulas (Node CLI, Python venv, prebuilt binary, service) + cask + automated bump workflows.

## Core

- [README.md](README.md): Formula + cask table, install commands
- [CLAUDE.md](CLAUDE.md): Tap structure, add/update workflows, reusable formula templates, non-obvious constraints

## Reusable patterns

- [CLAUDE.md#reusable-patterns](CLAUDE.md): Formula templates (Node CLI, Python venv, prebuilt binary, service) + workflow patterns (auto-bump dispatch, scheduled livecheck cron) to copy/adapt
